title: Notification No.107/2004-Cus(NT), dated 23.09.2004
text: 23rd September , 2004 Notification No. 107/2004 - Customs ( N.T) In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 4 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962) read with section 24 of the General Clauses Act, 1897 (10 of 1897), the following amendments in the notifications specified in column (2) of the Table below are made by the Board , as specified in the corresponding entry in column (3) of the said Table , namely :- Table Sl.No. Notification No . Amendments (1) (2) (3) 1 47/99-Customs(N.T), dated the 17th August,1999 [G.S.R 593 (E),dated the 17th August,1999 ] In the said notification, for the words and brackets, "the Central Government hereby appoints the Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), New Delhi ", the following shall be substituted, namely:- " the Board hereby appoints Shri H.K.Mittal, Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Delhi". 2 2/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 2nd January, 2004 [ G.S.R 5(E),dated the 2nd January, 2004 ] In the said notification, for the words " the Commissioner of Customs , Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi" , the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Shri H.K.Mittal , Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Delhi". 3 38/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 25th March, 2004[G.S.R 213 (E), dated the 25th March, 2004 ] In the said notification, for the words and brackets " the Commissioner of Customs , Inland Container Depot, Tughlakabad, New Delhi , to act as Commissioner of Customs (Port), Kolkata ", the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Shri H.K.Mittal , Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Delhi". 4 39/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 25th March, 2004 [ G.S.R 214 (E), dated the 25th March, 2004 ] In the said notification, for the portion beginning with the words and brackets " the Commissioner of Customs (Exports)" and ending with the words " Tughlakabad, New Delhi", the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Shri H.K.Mittal, Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Delhi". 5 98/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 26th August, 2004 [G.S.R 544(E), dated the 26th August,2004 ] In the said notification, for the portion beginning with the words and brackets " the Commissioner of Customs (Exports) " and ending with the brackets and words " ( Import and General), New Delhi " , the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Shri H.K.Mittal, Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Delhi". 6 99/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 26th August, 2004 [ G.S.R 545 (E), dated the 26th August, 2004 ] In the said notification, for the portion beginning with the words and brackets " the Commissioner of Customs (Exports) " and ending with the words " Tughlakabad, New Delhi " , the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Shri H.K.Mittal, Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Delhi". 7 100/2004-Customs(N.T), dated the 26th August, 2004 [ G.S.R 546 (E), dated the 26th August, 2004 ] In the said notification, for the portion beginning with the words and brackets "Commissioner of Customs (Exports)" and ending with the words "Tughlakabad, New Delhi" , the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Shri H.K.Mittal, Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication), Delhi". -- 1 of 3 -- 8 73/2003-Customs (N.T), dated the 10th September,2003 [G.S.R 724 (E),dated the 10thSeptember,2003] In the said notification, for the portion beginning with the words "Commissioner of Customs , Kandla" and ending with the word " Ahmedabad " , the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Additional Director General (Vigilance), Mumbai". 9 97/2003-Customs(N.T.), dated the 7th November, 2003 [ G.S.R 873 (E), dated the 7th November, 2003] In the said notification, for the portion beginning with the words "Commissioner of Customs , Kandla" and ending with the words " Commissioner of Customs, Ahmedabad" , the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Additional Director General (Vigilance), Mumbai". 10 51/2004-Customs (N.T) , dated the 20th April, 2004 [ G.S.R 270 (E), dated the 20th April, 2004 ] In the said notification, for the portion beginning with the words , "Commissioner of Customs , Customs House, Kandla" and ending with the word " Goa" , the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Additional Director General (Vigilance), Mumbai". 11 33/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 17th March, 2004[G.S.R 197 (E), dated the 17th March ,2004 ] In the said notification, for the portion beginning with the words "Commissioner of Customs , Bangalore" and ending with the words and brackets "Commissioner of Customs (Air Port), Chennai " , the following shall be substituted, namely:- "Commissioner of Central Excise (Adjudication) , Bangalore". D.S. Garbyal Under Secretary to the Government of India F.No.437/36/2004-Cus.IV Note: 1. The principal Notification No.47/99-Customs (N.T), dated the 17th August, 1999 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 17th August,1999 vide G.S.R 593 (E), dated the 17th August,1999. 2. The principal Notification No.2/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 2nd January, 2004 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 2nd January, 2004, vide G.S.R 5 (E), ), dated the 2nd January, 2004. 3. The principal Notification No.38/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 25th March , 2004 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 25th March , 2004, vide G.S.R 213 (E), dated the 25th March , 2004. 4. The principal Notification No.39/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 25th March, 2004 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 25th March , 2004, vide G.S.R 214 (E), dated the 25th March , 2004. 5. The principal Notification No.98/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 26th August , 2004 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 26th August , 2004, vide G.S.R 544(E), dated the 26th August , 2004. 6. The principal Notification No.99/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 26th August , 2004 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 26th August , 2004, vide G.S.R 545(E), dated the 26th August , 2004. 7. The principal Notification No.100/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 26th August , 2004 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 26th August , 2004, vide G.S.R 546(E), dated the 26th August , 2004. 8. The principal Notification No.73/2003-Customs (N.T), dated the 10th September, 2003 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 10th September, 2003, vide G.S.R 724(E), dated the 10th September, 2003. 9. The principal Notification No.97/2003-Customs (N.T), dated the 7th November, 2003 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 7th November, 2003, vide G.S.R 873(E), dated the 7th November, 2003. 10. The principal Notification No.51/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 20th April, 2004 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i), dated the 20th April, 2004, vide G.S.R 270(E), dated the 20th April, 2004. -- 2 of 3 -- 11. The principal Notification No.33/2004-Customs (N.T), dated the 17th March, 2004 was published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated the 17th March, 2004 , vide G.S.R.197 (E), dated the 17th March, 2004. -- 3 of 3 --
